trans-unit.source: E-mail address of the administrator of the current page (system config or website root settings).
trans-unit.target: E-Mail-Adresse des Administrators der aktuellen Seite (Systemeinstellungen oder Einstellungen der Rootseite).

trans-unit.source: Friendly name for the e-mail address of the administrator of the current page (system config or website root settings).
trans-unit.target: Anzeigename für die E-Mail-Adresse des Administrators der aktuellen Seite (Systemeinstellungen oder Einstellungen der Rootseite).

trans-unit.source: All the form fields.
File paths for upload form fields.
All the form field labels.
All the form generator configuration fields.
All the form fields and their raw values.
All filled in form fields and their raw values.
trans-unit.target: Alle ausgefüllten Formularfelder und deren Rohdaten.

trans-unit.source: All the form fields and their raw values with html line breaks.
trans-unit.target: Alle Formularfelder und deren Rohdaten als HTML.

trans-unit.source: All filled in form fields and their raw values with html line breaks.
trans-unit.target: Alle ausgefüllten Formularfelder und deren Rohdaten als HTML.

trans-unit.source: Originating domain of the member notification.
ID of the opt-in token.
Activation link for the member registration.
ID of the opt-in token.
All the data of the member.
Unformatted data of the member.
E-mail of the newsletter recipient.
Activation link for the newsletter.
Activation token, if you want to build the activation link yourself.
trans-unit.target: Aktivierungs-Token, um die Aktivierungs-URL selber zu bauen.

trans-unit.source: Domain where the newsletter form was subscribed to.
trans-unit.target: Domain unter welcher die Newsletter-Anmeldung vorgenommen wurde.

trans-unit.source: Comma-separated list of the subscribed newsletter channels.
Comma-separated list of the subscribed newsletter channel IDs.
trans-unit.target: Komma-getrennte Liste der IDs angemeldeten Newsletter-Kanäle.
